# Akhet PACS

> Akhet PACS is a native, high-performance DICOM viewer, built in Rust, that is
> evolving into a complete PACS for clinics, hospitals and diagnostic imaging
> centers. The first 10 founding clinics use it free, forever. The project is
> open to contributors and currently in phase 1 of 5 of its roadmap.

Akhet started as a native DICOM viewer and is in the middle of phase 1: the
clinical core — window/level, measurements, multi-viewport, MPR and 3D volume
rendering — already works on real CT, MR, ultrasound, mammography and
angiography studies. What is still missing is the study browser and the Windows
and macOS installers. Site is available in Portuguese (default), English and
Spanish.

## Key facts

- Product: native desktop DICOM viewer for Windows, macOS and Linux, evolving into a full PACS.
- Founders offer: the first 10 clinics use Akhet free, forever — the whole clinic, every workstation. Pricing then climbs in steps to a ceiling below an imported viewer.
- Modalities supported today: CT, MR, ultrasound (US), mammography, angiography.
- Working features: window/level, multi-viewport, multiplanar reconstruction (MPR), 3D volume rendering, measurements (Cobb angle, free angle, elliptical ROI, polygon, freehand).
- Status: phase 1 of 5; clinical core functional; study browser and Windows/macOS installers in development.
- Technology: written in Rust; GPU rendering via wgpu; DICOM decoding via dicom-rs.
- Privacy: patient identifiers (PHI) are redacted by construction — never reach logs or recorded sessions.

## Pages

- [Home (Português)](https://akhetpacs.com/): overview, viewer screenshots, roadmap, pricing and how to join.
- [Home (English)](https://akhetpacs.com/en/): same content in English.
- [Home (Español)](https://akhetpacs.com/es/): same content in Spanish.

## Contact

- Clinics: reach out via WhatsApp to try Akhet and shape the roadmap.
- Contributors: the project looks for people to build medical software in Rust, with clean architecture and tests over real studies.
